de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlIO

Packages that use JmlIO
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.

    void
    JmlAssert.translateCondition(JmlIO jmlIo, ProgramVariableCollection pv)
    Translates the condition of this JML assert statement to a Term.
